articles.full_text:
Fundraiser launched after man dies from heat stroke
(BATESVILLE, Ind.) – A fundraiser has been launched after a Batesville man passed away this week.
Friends and family are hoping to raise funds to transport his body back to Mexico.
You can access the Go Fund Me by clicking this link.
